nasb.text: Israel was holy to the Lord, The first of His harvest. All who ate of it became guilty; Evil came upon them,” declares the Lord.’ ”

esv.text: Israel was holy to the Lord, the firstfruits of his harvest. All who ate of it incurred guilt; disaster came upon them, declares the Lord.”

cnv.text: 那時，以色列歸耶和華為聖， 作他初熟的土產。 吞吃她的，都算為有罪， 災禍必臨到他們。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 以色列是耶和华的圣民， 是属于祂的初熟果子。 吞吃它的必担当罪责， 大祸临头。 这是耶和华说的。’”
